rationale: test_rdkafka_oversized_message added; documents that heimq enforces no server-side max.message.bytes (verified: max_message_bytes in capabilities.rs is informational, not checked in produce path), produces 4 MiB payload, asserts no hang and full round-trip integrity.

findings.summary: Test correctly bumps client-side caps (message.max.bytes, receive.message.max.bytes) to isolate server behavior from librdkafka defaults.
Hang-detection via elapsed-time assertion satisfies the 'not a hang' acceptance requirement.
